Full generated SQL and \texttt{EXPLAIN} plans are in the replication package.}

    \texttt{prisma} & 1 & 1 & 4 & 1 & 1 \\
    \texttt{sequelize} & 1 & 1 & 1 & 1 & 1 \\
    \texttt{typeorm} & 1 & 1 & 2 & 1 & 2 \\
